name: naina
story: lives on my desk. priya got it for my 28th. now my cat is obsessed with it lol

name: aarav
story: from the golden hour drop. burns while i read. it smells like 6pm in the best way. didn't expect that.

name: ishita
story: i carry it every weekend to the farmers' market. people stop me to ask where it's from. soft flex tbh.

name: ananya
story: housewarming gift. set of four. the rose one is my favorite. nobody is allowed to use the rose one.

name: rohan
story: my wife got me this in mustard. i wore it through three winters. she thinks i need a new one. i'm not getting a new one.

name: shreya
story: above my desk. warm-toned riso. saanvi picked it. the cat is no longer obsessed (she got bored). i am still obsessed.

name: kabir
story: got this as a crossed-threads gift from my best friend. wore it on my first date with the person who's now my wife. lol unrelated. fine. related.

name: tara
story: for my niece's 1st birthday. she calls it 'bobu'. bobu has been to four countries now.
